description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image, runs `bundle install` as a before_script for every job, and defines the variable JEKYLL_ENV=production. Define two stages: test and deploy. In the test stage add a `test` job that executes `bundle exec jekyll build -d test`, saves the `test` directory as an artifact, and runs on all branches except `master`. In the deploy stage add a `pages` job that runs `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`, publishes the `public` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact that expires after 31 days, and only runs on the `master` branch.
